questions.question:
Let's determine your 
travel type. Up for a quiz?

options.text: I need to do my shopping first.
I'm going to a bar, maybe later.
Just ordered food, I guess I have time.
New theater tickets dropped!

questions.question: First night in a new city?

options.text: Taste local, authentic cuisine
Check out the bars and clubs first
Evening walk through the old town
Relax at the hotel bar, grab a drink
Yummy, pretty looking food and drinks
Night outs with old and new friends
Pieces of art, museums, theater plays
Views, beaches, mountains

questions.question: You pick a destination based on...

options.text: The interesting food scene
Known clubs, bars, unique night life
Famous landmarks, galleries
Beaches, mountains, views

questions.question: Your travel budget goes mostly on...

options.text: Restaurants, cafes and food stands
Clubs, bars and social events
Museum tours, gallery tickets
Stays, experiences, rides, walks
